hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hΓ₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS : ↑S ⊆ U := by
      intro x hx

S := insert φ Γ
    let codes := S.image encode
    have h_nonempty : codes.Nonempty := ⟨encode φ, Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_insert_self _ _)⟩
    let m := codes.max' h_nonempty
    have hm : m ∈ codes := Finset.max'_mem _ _
    obtain ⟨δ, hδS, hδm⟩ := Finset.mem_image.mp hm

    have h_subset : ↑(S.erase δ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode δ) := by

      have hne : σ ≠ δ := Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hσ

        (Finset.le_max' _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ hσS) |>.trans_eq hδm.symm) 
        (by intro eq

hΓ_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with

    have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by

Γ' := insert φ Γ
    have hΓ' : ↑Γ' ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by

⟨i_φ, h_φ⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hφ
    let m := i_φ + encode ψ
    have consistent : ∀ i (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑S ⊆ construction T hT i → S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i S hS hC
      induction i generalizing S with
      | zero =>
        simp [construction] at hS
        have : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction S using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty => simp

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS : ∃ k, ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k := by
      obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using hφ
      use max i (encode ψ) + 1
      intro x hx

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS : S.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by simpa [S] using this
    
    let S_bad := S.filter (λ x => x ∉ construction T hT 0)
    by_cases h_empty : S_bad.Nonempty
    . obtain ⟨δ, hδ, hmax⟩ := S_bad.exists_max (encode ·)
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hδ
      
      have h_subset : ↑(S.erase δ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode δ) := by
        intro σ hσ
        simp at hσ

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ U := by
      intro γ hγ
      simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_insert] at hγ
      rcases hγ with rfl | hγ
      . exact hφ
      . exact monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _) (hΓ hγ)

    obtain ⟨δ, hδ, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image S encode (Finset.insert_nonempty φ Γ)
    
    have h_enc_lt : ∀ γ ∈ S.erase δ, encode γ < encode δ := by
      intro γ hγ
      rw [Finset.mem_erase] at hγ
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (hmax γ hγ.2) (ne_of_apply_ne encode hγ.1)

    have h_sub_enc : ↑(S.erase δ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode δ) := by
      intro γ hγ
      have hγ_mem : γ ∈ U := hS_sub (Finset.erase_subset _ _ hγ)
      apply monotone_construction (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (h_enc_lt γ hγ))
      rcases of_mem_construction_omega hγ_mem with h0 | hsucc
      . apply monotone_construction (Nat.zero_le _) h0
      . rw [construction]

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS : ↑S ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
      intro x hx

consistent (i) (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i) : Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      induction i generalizing Δ with
      | zero =>
        simp [construction] at hΔ
        have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty => simp

h_cons : ∀ i, ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i

h : encode ψ ≤ encode φ
    . apply not_of_mem_construction_omega (monotone_construction h hΓ) this hφ
    . let S := insert φ Γ
      have hS : S.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by simpa [S, Finset.conj_insert] using this
      obtain ⟨m, hm, hmax⟩ := S.exists_max_image encode (Finset.insert_nonempty φ Γ)
      have hm_in : m ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
        simp [S, Set.insert_subset, hφ]
        exact (Set.subset_iUnion _ (encode ψ)).trans hΓ
      apply not_of_mem_construction_omega (φ := m) _ _ (hm_in hm)
      . intro x hx
        have : encode x < encode m := lt_of_le_of_ne (hmax x (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)) (ne_of_apply_ne _ (Finset.mem_erase.mp hx).1)
        apply monotone_construction (Nat.succ_le_of_lt this)
        have : x ∈ construction_omega T hT := hm_in (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)
        obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.1 this
        apply monotone_construction (Nat.le_add_left _ _) hi
      . convert hS using 1
        simp [Finset.conj_insert_of_mem hm]
Ω := Γ.conj ⋏ φ
hΓ_sub : ↑Γ ⊆ construction_omega T hT := fun x hx => Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨encode ψ, hΓ hx⟩

consistent : ∀ i (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i Δ hΔ hC
      induction i with
      | zero =>
        have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty => apply T.mem_of_provable

le_or_gt (encode ψ) (encode φ) with hle | hgt
    . apply not_of_mem_construction_omega (monotone_construction hle hΓ) this
      exact hφ
    . have consistent : ∀ i, ∀ Γ : Finset _, ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
        intro i

h : encode φ < encode ψ
    . have : φ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := by
        suffices φ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ + 1) from
          monotone_construction (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h) this

S := insert φ Γ
    have hS : S.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed (by grind) this

    obtain ⟨δ, hδ, hmax⟩ : ∃ δ ∈ S, ∀ γ ∈ S, encode γ ≤ encode δ := by
      have : (S.image encode).Nonempty := ⟨encode φ, Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_insert_self _ _)⟩
      obtain ⟨e, he, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image S encode this
      exact ⟨e, he, hmax⟩

    have h_sub : ↑(S.erase δ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode δ) := by
      intro γ hγ
      have hle := hmax γ (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hγ)
      have heq : encode γ ≠ encode δ := by
        intro h
        have : γ = δ := Encodable.encode_injective h
        subst this
        exact Finset.not_mem_erase δ S hγ
      have hlt : encode γ < encode δ := Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hle heq
      
      have hγ_in : γ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
        simp [S] at hδ
        rcases (Finset.mem_insert.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hγ)) with (rfl | h)
        . exact hφ
        . rw [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion]

lt_or_ge (encode φ) (encode ψ) with h_lt | h_ge
    . let Δ := insert φ Γ
      have hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT (encode ψ) := by
        intro x hx

Θ := insert φ Γ
    have hΘ_sub : ↑Θ ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
      intro x hx
      simp at hx
      rcases hx with rfl | hx
      . exact hφ
      . apply monotone_construction (le_add_right (encode ψ) 1)
        exact hΓ hx
    
    have hΘ_imp : Θ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
      apply T.mem_trans (ψ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ)
      . apply T.mem_of_provable
